_comment: Domain authority tiers for citation_audit.py --source-authority and news_discover.py --min-tier. Order = authority. ALLOWLIST-FIRST: the gate is 'every piece must anchor on >=1 tier-1/2 source', not 'block all bad domains' (a blacklist is whack-a-mole). The blacklist is a supplement for sources that must NEVER be cited (aggregator redirects, republishers) — cite the primary publisher instead. Matching is by registrable-domain suffix, so 'anthropic.com' also matches 'www.anthropic.com' and subdomains. Unknown domains are WARNed, never hard-failed — this list cannot be exhaustive. User-maintained; keep additions evidence-based.
_blacklist_note: Never cite these — aggregators/redirects/republishers. Resolve to the original publisher and cite THAT. Replace the .invalid placeholder with real content farms as you find them (evidence-based).
